v4_with_confidence.changes: Added confidence + reasoning fields to schema as a routing signal.

v4b_no_confidence.changes: Removed confidence + reasoning fields from v4. Result: +9.6% accuracy.

candidate_xml_2026-06-20.changes: XML-tagged variant of v4b. Tied baseline; v4b stays champion (Occam's razor).

optimizer_run_2026-06-20.verdict: No candidate beats v4b; v4b retains champion status.
optimizer_run_2026-06-20.lesson: Optimizing an already-strong prompt yields diminishing or negative returns. Save the optimizer for failing prompts.
